motion_caption: The camera begins by moving backward and to the right while rising, panning left and tilting up slightly. It continues this backward and upward trajectory with a slight left pan. Around the 2-second mark, the camera starts to tilt down while still moving backward and right. In the final two seconds, the motion shifts as the camera slides left, pans right, and tilts down sharply, ending with a slight forward and rightward slide while maintaining the downward tilt.
